creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 200771
py-drf-yasg-1.11.1.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates www/py-drf-yasg to 1.11.1 .

Changes by upstream:
- https://github.com/axnsan12/drf-yasg/blob/1.11.1/docs/changelog.rst

Changes to the port:
- removed post-patch target because the patch for setup.py regarding devel/py-setuptools_scm is no longer required

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.2-, 12.0-RELEASE, 13.0-CURRENT@

Note:
- Before this update can be committed bug #234611 must be added to the ports tree first
- There already a newer version out but that version is not officially approved by the NetBox development team, yet.
